name: dm-skills
description: Claude Code skills for tabletop RPG Dungeon Masters. Query spells, magic items, and monster stat blocks drawn from the D&D 5e SRD. Designed for campaign prep in Claude Code.

plugins.name: dnd
plugins.description: Core D&D 5e skills backed by SRD 5.2.1 content — monsters, spells, magic items, rules, character creation, equipment stats, and DM toolbox (traps, poisons, curses)

plugins.name: eberron
plugins.description: Eberron campaign setting — search sourcebook lore from ERLW, Exploring Eberron 2024, and Frontiers of Eberron
